JEP-DARK_REFLECT_POWER.title: Dark Reflect
JEP-DARK_REFLECT_POWER.description: Blocked attack damage is reflected to your attacker this turn.
JEP-DARK_REFLECT_POWER.smartDescription: Blocked attack damage is reflected to your attacker this turn.
JEP-WET_POWER.title: Depressed
JEP-WET_POWER.description: For the next 1 turns, Reduce [gold]block[/gold] gain by half
JEP-WET_POWER.smartDescription: For the next [blue]{Amount}[/blue] turns, Reduce [gold]block[/gold] gain by half
JEP-GRANNY_WISDOM_POWER.title: Rewind
JEP-GRANNY_WISDOM_POWER.description: Repeat this turn action in the next turn
JEP-GRANNY_WISDOM_POWER.smartDescription: Repeat this turn action in the next [blue]{Amount}[/blue] turns(Treated as buff)
JEP-AZURE_SEA_POWER.title: Azure Sea
JEP-AZURE_SEA_POWER.description:
Whenever this target takes damage, apply [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Blue Rose[/gold] to all of its allies. 
When removed, activate all [gold]Blue Rose[/gold] and remove them from allies.
JEP-AZURE_SEA_POWER.smartdescription:
Whenever this target takes damage, apply [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Blue Rose[/gold] to all of its allies.
When removed, activate all [gold]Blue Rose[/gold] and remove them from allies.
JEP-BLUE_ROSE_POWER.title: Blue Rose
JEP-BLUE_ROSE_POWER.description: At the start of its turn, this target loses HP equal to half of the [gold]Blue Rose[/gold] stacks, then halve the stacks
JEP-BLUE_ROSE_POWER.smartdescription: At the start of its turn, this target loses HP equal to half of the [gold]Blue Rose[/gold] stacks, then halve the stacks
